case_title: MULHOLLAND, IRVIN vs. VORTEL COMMUNICTIONS, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULHOLLAND, IRVIN AS TO DEFENDANT VORTEL COMMUNICTIONS, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULHOLLAND, IRVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VORTEL COMMUNICTIONS, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION $1,598.14 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,678.14
